name: Broccoli and Cauliflower Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the broccoli and cauliflower very thin.
2. Chop the onion.
3. Mix the dressing ingredients (mayonnaise, sugar, oil, salt, and pepper) in a bowl until well combined.
4. Add the chopped vegetables to the dressing and stir until evenly coated.
5. Crumble the bacon on top if desired.
6. Cover the salad and store it in the refrigerator for up to several days.
